title: Programme templates
description: Versioned packages that define what every site in a programme receives.

steps.title: Your templates
steps.description: One per beneficiary type: school, clinic, home.
steps.voiceScript: A template defines the package a site receives. Typically one per kind of beneficiary -- a school, a clinic, a household.
steps.captionText: A template defines the package a site receives. Typically one per kind of beneficiary -- a school, a clinic, a household.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your templates: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create one
steps.description: Give it a code, a name and a beneficiary type.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create one: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Code, name, type
steps.description: The code must be unique in your organisation.
steps.voiceScript: Give it a code, a name, and the beneficiary type it serves. The code must be unique within your organisation.
steps.captionText: Give it a code, a name, and the beneficiary type it serves. The code must be unique within your organisation.
steps.fallbackMessage: Code, name, type: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: It is born as Draft v1
steps.voiceScript: It is created with version one, in Draft. A draft cannot be built from -- it is submitted, then approved, and only then published.
steps.captionText: It is created with version one, in Draft. A draft cannot be built from -- it is submitted, then approved, and only then published.
steps.fallbackMessage: It is born as Draft v1: not visible on this screen yet.
